lines: Yes' Umwami ndamubonye, Kandi sinkimwimura; Yemeye kunyoz' i by aha Byambuzag' ubugingo.
Nta kirut' Umwami Yesu Mw’ isi cyangwa mw ijuru. Ni We watuguz' amaraso
Amaras' arantangaza : Yarampembuye mpfuye. Ampesh' amahoro menshi No
Ubwo wampinduy' umwana, Non' umpindur' ingeso, Kugira ng’ undeba wese
Ndagushima ko wanshatse Kandi ko wantaruye, Ukanyogesh' amaraso Kubw’
Mwami Yes' ump' urukundo, Rwo wakunz' a bo mw isi. Umpe kugukunda rwose,
Warampfiriye, Mukiza : Noneho, mpfane nawe ! Kand' usohoze muri jye ibyo
